title: Subsemigroups of nilpotent groups: an acknowledgement
journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A. Mathematical and Physical Sciences
abstract:
Abstract
                  Academician A. I. Mal’cev has kindly drawn my attention to his paper (Mal’cev J953) which almost completely anticipates the results of Neumann & Taylor (1963). There is a slight difference between Mal’cev’s laws and ours, in that his contain an additional, superfluous variable.
